About Me

AQSA ZAM ZAM MIRZA JOHAR BAIG

Law Student · Legal Researcher · Urdu Poet

Amravati, Maharashtra, India

AQSA ZAM ZAM MIRZA JOHAR BAIG

Also known as: Aqsa Mirza · AqsA Zam Zam · Aqsa Johar Baig

Background & Education

AQSA ZAM ZAM MIRZA JOHAR BAIG — commonly referred to as Aqsa Mirza, AqsA Zam Zam, or Aqsa Johar Baig — is a dedicated Law Student at Prakash Law College (PDLC), Amravati, Maharashtra. Her academic journey is defined by a deep commitment to the pursuit of justice, legal scholarship, and the empowerment of communities through legal literacy.

Her specialization in Legal Research has equipped her with advanced skills in statutory interpretation, case law analysis, legal database research (SCC Online, Manupatra, Indian Kanoon), and academic legal writing. She actively participates in Moot Court competitions, legal aid clinics, and institutional legal debates.

AQSA ZAM ZAM MIRZA JOHAR BAIG is based in Amravati, Maharashtra, India — a city steeped in history and legal tradition. Her proximity to local courts and legal institutions has given her practical exposure to civil and criminal proceedings from an early stage of her legal education.

Beyond the law library, she is a passionate Urdu Shayari poet and curator, believing deeply that the same precision which defines legal drafting also illuminates the best Urdu verse. Her literary pursuits keep her grounded in language, empathy, and the human dimension of justice.

Education

LL.B. — Bachelor of Laws

Current

Prakash Law College (PDLC), Amravati

Specialization: Legal Research

Amravati, Maharashtra, India
  • Specialization in Legal Research and Legal Drafting
  • Active participant in Moot Court competitions
  • Member of Legal Aid Clinic — providing free legal assistance
  • Contributor to college law journal

Legal & Professional Skills

SkillDescriptionProficiency
Legal ResearchStatutory interpretation, case law analysis, legal databases (SCC, Manupatra)
92%
Legal DraftingPetitions, affidavits, contracts, plaints, written statements
88%
Constitutional LawFundamental Rights (Part III), Directive Principles, judiciary structure
85%
CommunicationOral advocacy, moot court arguments, client counselling
90%
Technical WritingLegal blogs, research papers, legal literacy articles
87%
Urdu LiteratureClassical Shayari, Ghazal tradition, Urdu prose and poetry
95%

Areas of Interest & Expertise

⚖️

Constitutional Law

Fundamental Rights, Directive Principles, Constitutional remedies and writ jurisdiction.

👩‍⚖️

Family & Personal Law

Women's rights in Muslim Personal Law, Hindu Succession Act, and gender-just jurisprudence.

📜

Evidence Law

Indian Evidence Act, admissibility of electronic evidence, burden of proof doctrines.

📋

Civil Procedure

Code of Civil Procedure, trial procedure, plaint and written statement drafting.

✍️

Legal Writing

Academic legal research, case commenting, and legal literacy journalism.

🌹

Urdu Literature

Classical Urdu poetry, Ghazal and Nazm tradition, Ghalib, Iqbal, Faiz, and Jaun Elia.
